name: Rosemeyer School Bus Svc
districts_or_customers: likely School District of Thorp area
recent_news: No M&A or notable news found; appears to be a long-running owner-operator bus service in Thorp, WI.
fit_notes: Micro single-operator route contractor in rural WI; too small to be a meaningful tuck-in on its own and Summit lacks WI density.

name: Pickner Busing
recent_news: Founded ~1970 by Ralph and Shirley Pickner; both founders are deceased per obituaries, and the related D&R Busing also served Chamberlain schools — suggests a generational/succession situation.
fit_notes: Multi-generational family operator with succession signal, but micro-fleet in rural SD makes it a marginal tuck-in; outside Summit's core geography.

name: Harold Smith LLC
districts_or_customers: likely School District of Mellen contract route
recent_news: No corporate or M&A activity found; appears to be a single-bus route contractor in remote northern WI.
fit_notes: Single-route micro-operator in rural Ashland County WI; not a meaningful tuck-in target for Summit.

name: Dallas Wheelchair Ride
districts_or_customers: insurance companies, rehab facilities, dialysis centers, and unspecified schools in McKinney/North Dallas, Collin and Denton counties
recent_news: Operates 24/7 wheelchair-accessible NEMT serving McKinney/North Dallas/Collin/Denton; owners cite ~20 years combined healthcare-industry experience; no M&A or notable news.
fit_notes: Primarily NEMT, not yellow-bus school transport; only tangential school exposure. Not a fit for Summit's school-bus tuck-in thesis.
